entries.text: must switch to Board view before clicking Add task; Grid view hides per-bucket Add button

entries.note: default landing view; welcome banner present and dismissable via 'Close welcome banner' label

entries.text: Tab labels are 'View Grid', 'View Board', 'View Timeline', etc — NOT 'Grid'/'Board'. Connector YAML must use the 'View ' prefix in navigate_by_labels.

Bucket headers use aria-label format 'Bucket: {name}, N of M. K tasks in this bucket. Press enter to add or view tasks in this column...' — NOT a clean role=group with the bucket name as label. Resolver needs prefix match on 'Bucket: {name}'.

Add task affordance is role=button on a DIV with aria-label 'Add task card in {bucket} column' — NOT a button labeled 'Add task'. Cannot be looked up by global 'Add task' label; must include bucket name.

Task cards aria-label format: '{title}, Use arrow keys to access important task information, press enter to access all task details. Use Ctrl+up arrow...' — NO 'Task card:' prefix. Connector capture pattern from_aria_label_match: 'Task card: (.+)' would match nothing. Use prefix-of-comma or split on ', Use arrow keys'.

Hover-revealed ellipsis is labeled 'More options' (inconsistent casing also seen: 'More Options', 'More actions') with NO task-name in the label. Multiple instances coexist on the page; resolver MUST scope to the hovered card's subtree.

Grid view default columns are: Task Name | Quick look | Assigned to | Duration | Labels — NO bucket, priority, or progress columns by default. list_tasks cannot map bucket from Grid view alone; must read from Board view (per-bucket walk) or open each task's detail panel.

children.label: Board view
children.note: buckets accessible here; switch via View Board tab

entries.text: Card ellipsis menu's delete entry is labelled 'Delete task' (not bare 'Delete'). YAML's `{label: Delete, role: menuitem}` exact-match fails. Use `label: 'Delete task'` or add `match_mode: prefix`.

v1.1.0 Phase B2 re-smoke (2026-04-17): all 6 prior DOM mismatches confirmed fixed end-to-end (View Board tab, bucket prefix match, 'Add task card in <bucket> column', `^(.+?), Use arrow keys` capture, subtree-scoped ellipsis, bucket-walk list_tasks). Subtree disambiguation reduced ellipsis matches from 78 (global) to 1 (in-card). Single new minor finding above.

Bucket 'Add task card in {bucket} column' affordances are <div role="button">, not <button>. Selectors must use role-aware matching (getByRole('button', {name})) or pure aria-label, NEVER button[aria-label=...] CSS — that fails.

The 'Add task' SUBMIT button inside the open inline-create form IS a real <button> with aria-label='Add task' (exact). It coexists in the DOM with the per-bucket div-buttons whose aria-label starts with 'Add task card in'. Use exact aria-label match to disambiguate.

Pressing Enter in the 'Enter a task name' input creates DUPLICATE cards — the input's keydown handler AND the form submit handler both fire. Always click the explicit 'Add task' submit button to commit. Verified on Premium Planner Apr 2026.
After clicking the 'Add task' submit, the inline-create form stays open with input cleared and re-focused. Enables fast bulk-add: open form once per bucket, loop fill+click submit, Escape when done.

The card-level 'More options' menu (lowercase o) is conditionally RENDERED on hover, not just CSS-hidden. Without a real CDP hover the button is absent from the DOM. Synthetic mouseenter/over events do NOT trigger render. Only Playwright locator.hover() (or the playwright-mcp browser_hover tool) works reliably; page.mouse.move at coordinates was unreliable.

Card listitems must be selected by [role=listitem].task-board-card — bare [role=listitem] also matches BUCKET HEADER listitems, which contain a 'More Options' (capital O) button that will be found instead of the card's 'More options' (lowercase o).

Bucket-walk extraction must enumerate ALL [role=listitem].task-board-card descendants in DOM order; for buckets with >~10 cards the bottom rows may be virtualized off-screen until scrolled. Verified during a 67-task round-trip; smaller buckets (<=10) had no virtualization.
